title: Wallets
excerpt: Learn about wallet payments with Stripe. Wallets let your customers pay online or in person, using either of the following: - A saved payment credential (a tokenized card or bank account stored in the wallet). - A stored wallet balance (funds held in an account with the wallet provider). At checkout, the wallet typically authenticates your customer and passes payment details or a payment token to you or your payment processor. You don’t have to directly handle your customer’s sensitive data. > Interested in using MoMo and GCash for one-time and recurring payments for customers in Vietnam and the Philippines?
